languages.text:
The user makes a galvanised attack with this augment, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} and destroying all {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} within it. Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.
Also gain {g|f:8f4a66a1c9674e2b9016f79cc73f58a6}Perplexed{/g}

traits.locale_text:
The user makes a galvanised attack with this augment, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} and destroying all {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} within it. Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.

languages.text:
The user makes a galvanised attack with this augment, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} and destroying all {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} within it. Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.
At the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Fires an overcharged shot from the eye, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 round, destroying all covers in it. Creatures in the zone gain no benefits from cover and recieve {uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} burning.
At the end of the turn, gain {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}Concussion{/g}

traits.locale_text:
The user makes an overcharge attack with this augment, creating a zone of melted ground for 1 round and destroying all covers within it. Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer {uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of burning.
At the end of the turn, the user suffers {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента совершает гальванизированную атаку этим аугментом и создает зону расплавленной земли на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, уничтожая все {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытия{/g} в этой зоне. Существа в зоне не могут прятаться в укрытии и получают {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горение{/g} (+{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e}).
В конце {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} обладатель аугмента испытывает {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузию{/g}.

languages.text:
El usuario realiza un ataque galvanizado con este aumento, creando una zona de terreno fundido que permanece durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g} y destruyendo toda la {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cobertura{/g} que haya en ella. Las criaturas que se encuentren en la zona afectada no pueden beneficiarse de cobertura y sufren +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g}.
Al final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario sufre una {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}.

Las criaturas que se encuentren en la zona afectada no pueden beneficiarse de cobertura y sufren +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g}.
Al final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario sufre una {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer macht einen galvanisierten Angriff mit dieser Augmentation, um den Boden 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang schmelzen zu lassen und alle {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckungsmöglichkeiten{/g} in diesem Bereich zu zerstören. Kreaturen in diesem Bereich können nicht in Deckung gehen und werden mit +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} belegt.
Am Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} wird der Nutzer mit {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterung{/g} belegt.

Kreaturen in diesem Bereich können nicht in Deckung gehen und werden mit +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, bu ogmentle galvanizli bir saldırı gerçekleştirerek erimiş zeminden bir alan oluşturur. Bu alan, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır ve içindeki tüm {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siperleri{/g} imha eder. Bu alandaki yaratıklar, siper alamazlar ve +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} etkisine maruz kalırlar.
Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turun{/g} sonunda {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıya{/g} maruz kalır.

Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turun{/g} sonunda {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıya{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur porte une attaque galvanisée avec cette augmentation, créant ainsi une zone de sol en fusion qui dure 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} et neutralise toute {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}couverture{/g} en son sein. Les créatures qui s'y trouvent ne peuvent pas se mettre à couvert et subissent +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g}.
À la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, l'utilisateur souffre de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}.

Les créatures qui s'y trouvent ne peuvent pas se mettre à couvert et subissent +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g}.
À la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, l'utilisateur souffre de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}.

languages.text:
使用此植入物进行一次电激攻击，创造一片持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}的熔化区域，并摧毁其中的所有{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。此区域内的生物无法利用掩体，并承受{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e}级{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}效果。
在{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态。

Creatures in this area cannot be in cover and suffer +{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用此植入物进行一次电激攻击，创造一片持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}的熔化区域，并摧毁其中的所有{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。此区域内的生物无法利用掩体，并承受{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e}级{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}效果。
在{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，使用者陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态。

languages.text:
使用者はこのオーグメティックでガルヴァニック攻撃を行い、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、溶融した地面の領域を生成し、その範囲内のすべての{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽{/g}を破壊する。この領域内のクリーチャーは遮蔽に入ることができず、{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}を+{uip|Burning|8052f618d19c4121884323f14ca54f8e}レベル受ける。
{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時、使用者は{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}脳震盪{/g}を受ける。
